query:
UPDATE outbox
               SET status = 'dead_letter'::outbox_status,
                   attempts = $1,
                   available_at = $2,
                   leased_at = NULL,
                   leased_until = NULL,
                   lease_token = NULL,
                   lease_owner = NULL,
                   updated_at = $2,
                   last_error = $3
               WHERE workspace_id = $4
                 AND id = $5
                 AND status = 'leased'::outbox_status
                 AND lease_token = $6
                 AND lease_owner = $7
                 AND leased_until > $2
